items.title: The new BitLocker exploit everyone's freaking out about probably won't affect you
items.summary: A new Windows-based zero-day exploit is currently making the rounds, with some reports claiming that it could give bad actors access to your BitLocker volume — the section of your hard drive designed to hold BitLocker's

items.title: Google finally lets you adjust TV settings with Gemini — here’s who can actually use it
items.summary: On June 11, Google announced the rollout of new Gemini features that enable you to use your voice to adjust Google TV settings. The initial rollout is limited, but the features are super convenient.

items.title: The Go 6 Gen II adds handwriting to a pocket e-reader, but Android 11 is a letdown
items.summary: If you like the portability of a small e-reader but wish it could do a bit more, BOOX's latest device may hit that sweet spot. The new Go 6 (Gen II) keeps the pocket-friendly design of the company's original, but adds a

items.title: YouTube is finally bringing back its direct messaging feature
items.summary: YouTube has announced that its new chat feature has begun rolling out to a much wider audience, including the US. This wider rollout follows a slow expansion across Europe over the last several months.

items.title: How AI and Linux devs are keeping old AMD Radeon cards alive
items.summary: If you have an old AMD Radeon card lying around, there’s some good news from the open-source community. A developer has used Microsoft’s GitHub Copilot to get the AMD R600 Gallium3D driver working on the latest Linux ver

items.title: Claude just released a Mythos-level model, but you only have 10 days to try it
items.summary: If you've been itching to get your hands on Claude's Mythos model — the company's top-tier model designed for deeper coding and even spotting bugs and cybersecurity issues in other apps and systems — then now might be yo

items.title: Siri’s big AI upgrade is actually just Google in a trench coat
items.summary: At its annual WWDC 2026 event, Apple finally showed off Siri AI, a major update to Apple Intelligence designed to make its often-criticised voice assistant smarter in today’s AI-driven world. Siri AI now has its own app,

items.title: After years of forcing Bing into Windows 11, Microsoft is finally backing down
items.summary: For years, Microsoft has been forcing Bing into Windows 11's local search functionality, making it nearly impossible to search for the apps and files you already have on your PC with trudging through lists of other nonse

items.title: These NotebookLM updates make our favorite research tool even smarter
items.summary: On June 8, Google announced major updates for its NotebookLM research tool. NotebookLM has been a big hit here at MUO, and these updates make it even smarter and more useful for complex research projects.

items.title: Brave Origin might be the one browser people don't mind paying for
items.summary: On June 4, Brave announced the stable release of Brave Origin — a premium browser designed to provide a streamlined experience.
